tracks.meaning: a fee or percentage of money earned paid to someone who arranges or facilitates a transaction or sale
a formal written instruction or authority granted to someone to act on behalf of another person or organization
an official warrant or authority to perform military duties or hold a specific rank
the act of giving someone the authority or responsibility to do something
a group of securities or a separate fund managed as a single investment entity
the act of hiring or employing someone, especially a performer or worker
a punishment or penalty imposed by an authority, especially an official rebuke or fine
to do something or carry out an action as requested or instructed
